<!-- wp:html --><style>
/* Hide TT4 theme chrome — our design has its own nav/footer */
.wp-site-blocks > header,
.wp-site-blocks > footer,
header.wp-block-template-part,
footer.wp-block-template-part,
.wp-block-template-part:first-child { display: none !important; }
.wp-block-post-title, .wp-block-spacer { display: none !important; }

/* Force body background to match our design */
html, body, .wp-site-blocks {
  background: #080E1C !important;
  background-color: #080E1C !important;
}

/* Ensure homepage wrapper is full-width */
#pacerai-homepage {
  width: 100%;
  max-width: 100vw;
  overflow-x: hidden;
}

/* Remove TT4 content area padding/constraints */
.wp-site-blocks,
.wp-site-blocks > main,
.wp-site-blocks > main > .wp-block-group,
.wp-site-blocks .is-layout-constrained,
.wp-site-blocks .is-layout-constrained > :where(:not(.alignleft):not(.alignright):not(.alignfull)),
.has-global-padding,
.entry-content {
  max-width: none !important;
  padding-left: 0 !important;
  padding-right: 0 !important;
  margin-left: 0 !important;
  margin-right: 0 !important;
  padding-top: 0 !important;
}

  :root {
    --navy: #080E1C;
    --navy-mid: #0F1929;
    --navy-light: #162038;
    --navy-border: #1E2D4A;
    --brand: #1C3560;
    --brand-blue: #2B7DC8;
    --teal: #27899A;
    --teal-light: #70C49C;
    --teal-pale: #D6F0E8;
    --cream: #F7F3EC;
    --white: #FFFFFF;
    --muted: #8A95A8;
    --text-light: #CDD5E0;
    --text-mid: #94A3B8;
    --green: #2DB87A;
    --red-subtle: #C94C4C;
  }

  #pacerai-homepage * { margin: 0; padding: 0; box-sizing: border-box; }
  #pacerai-homepage { scroll-behavior: smooth; }

  #pacerai-homepage {
    font-family: 'DM Sans', sans-serif;
    background: var(--navy);
    color: var(--text-light);
    overflow-x: hidden;
    font-size: 15px;
    line-height: 1.65;
  }

  /* ─── NAV ─── */
  #pacerai-homepage nav {
    position: fixed; top: 0; left: 0; right: 0; z-index: 100;
    display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between;
    padding: 0 48px;
    height: 68px;
    background: rgba(8,14,28,0.92);
    backdrop-filter: blur(14px);
    border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(28,53,96,0.6);
  }

  #pacerai-homepage .nav-logo {
    display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 10px;
    text-decoration: none;
  }
  #pacerai-homepage .nav-logo .mark {
    width: 34px; height: 34px;
    background: var(--teal);
    clip-path: polygon(50% 0%, 100% 25%, 100% 75%, 50% 100%, 0% 75%, 0% 25%);
    display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;
  }
  #pacerai-homepage .nav-logo .wordmark {
    font-family: 'Cormorant Garamond', serif;
    font-size: 22px; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: 0.04em;
    color: var(--white);
  }
  #pacerai-homepage .nav-logo .wordmark span { color: var(--teal); }

  #pacerai-homepage .nav-links {
    display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 4px;
    list-style: none;
  }
  #pacerai-homepage .nav-links > li { position: relative; }
  #pacerai-homepage .nav-links > li > a {
    display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 5px;
    padding: 8px 14px;
    font-size: 13.5px; font-weight: 500; letter-spacing: 0.02em;
    color: var(--text-mid);
    text-decoration: none;
    border-radius: 6px;
    transition: color 0.2s, background 0.2s;
  }
  #pacerai-homepage .nav-links > li > a:hover { color: var(--white); background: rgba(255,255,255,0.05); }
  #pacerai-homepage .nav-links > li > a .chevron {
    font-size: 10px; margin-top: 1px;
    transition: transform 0.2s;
  }
  #pacerai-homepage .nav-links > li:hover > a .chevron { transform: rotate(180deg); }

  /* Dropdown */
  #pacerai-homepage .dropdown {
    display: none;
    position: absolute; top: 100%; left: 50%;
    transform: translateX(-50%);
    background: var(--navy-mid);
    border: 1px solid var(--navy-border);
    border-radius: 12px;
    padding: 20px;
    padding-top: 28px;
    min-width: 520px;
    box-shadow: 0 24px 60px rgba(0,0,0,0.6);
  }
  /* Invisible bridge to prevent hover gap */
  #pacerai-homepage .dropdown::before {
    content: '';
    position: absolute;
    top: -12px; left: 0; right: 0;
    height: 12px;
  }
  #pacerai-homepage .nav-links > li:hover .dropdown { display: block; }

  #pacerai-homepage .dropdown-grid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; gap: 0 32px; }
  #pacerai-homepage .dropdown-col-label {
    font-size: 10px; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: 0.12em;
    text-transform: uppercase; color: var(--teal);
    padding-bottom: 10px; margin-bottom: 6px;
    border-bottom: 1px solid var(--navy-border);
  }
  #pacerai-homepage .dropdown a {
    display: flex; align-items: flex-start; gap: 12px;
    padding: 10px 10px; border-radius: 8px;
    text-decoration: none;
    transition: background 0.15s;
  }
  #pacerai-homepage .dropdown a:hover { background: rgba(255,255,255,0.04); }
  #pacerai-homepage .dropdown .d-icon {
    width: 32px; height: 32px; flex-shrink: 0;
    background: var(--navy-light);
    border: 1px solid var(--navy-border);
    border-radius: 7px;
    display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;
    font-size: 14px;
  }
  #pacerai-homepage .dropdown .d-text .d-title {
    font-size: 13px; font-weight: 500; color: var(--white);
    display: block; line-height: 1.3;
  }
  #pacerai-homepage .dropdown .d-text .d-desc {
    font-size: 12px; color: var(--muted); line-height: 1.4;
    margin-top: 2px;
  }

  #pacerai-homepage .single-dropdown { min-width: 220px; }
  #pacerai-homepage .single-dropdown a {
    padding: 9px 12px; border-radius: 8px;
    text-decoration: none; display: block;
    font-size: 13px; font-weight: 500; color: var(--text-light);
    transition: background 0.15s, color 0.15s;
  }
  #pacerai-homepage .single-dropdown a:hover { background: rgba(255,255,255,0.05); color: var(--white); }

  /* Hamburger — hidden on desktop */
  #pacerai-homepage .mobile-menu-btn {
    display: none;
    flex-direction: column;
    gap: 5px;
    background: none;
    border: none;
    cursor: pointer;
    padding: 8px;
    z-index: 101;
  }
  #pacerai-homepage .mobile-menu-btn span {
    display: block;
    width: 22px; height: 2px;
    background: var(--text-light);
    border-radius: 2px;
    transition: all 0.3s;
  }
  #pacerai-homepage .mobile-menu-btn.open span:nth-child(1) {
    transform: rotate(45deg) translate(5px, 5px);
  }
  #pacerai-homepage .mobile-menu-btn.open span:nth-child(2) { opacity: 0; }
  #pacerai-homepage .mobile-menu-btn.open span:nth-child(3) {
    transform: rotate(-45deg) translate(5px, -5px);
  }

  #pacerai-homepage .nav-right {
    display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 12px;
  }
  #pacerai-homepage .btn-ghost {
    padding: 8px 18px; font-size: 13.5px; font-weight: 500;
    color: var(--text-light); background: transparent;
    border: 1px solid var(--navy-border); border-radius: 7px;
    cursor: pointer; text-decoration: none;
    transition: all 0.2s;
  }
  #pacerai-homepage .btn-ghost:hover { color: var(--white); border-color: rgba(39,137,154,0.45); }
  #pacerai-homepage .btn-teal {
    padding: 9px 20px; font-size: 13.5px; font-weight: 600;
    color: #fff; background: var(--teal);
    border: none; border-radius: 7px;
    cursor: pointer; text-decoration: none;
    transition: all 0.2s; letter-spacing: 0.02em;
  }
  #pacerai-homepage .btn-teal:hover { background: var(--teal-light); transform: translateY(-1px); box-shadow: 0 8px 20px rgba(39,137,154,0.35); }

  /* ─── HERO ─── */
  #pacerai-homepage .hero {
    min-height: 100vh;
    display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; justify-content: center;
    text-align: center;
    padding: 120px 24px 80px;
    position: relative;
    overflow: hidden;
  }

  #pacerai-homepage .hero-bg {
    position: absolute; inset: 0; z-index: 0;
    background:
      radial-gradient(ellipse 900px 600px at 50% 30%, rgba(39,137,154,0.09) 0%, transparent 70%),
      radial-gradient(ellipse 600px 400px at 80% 60%, rgba(45,184,122,0.04) 0%, transparent 60%),
      linear-gradient(180deg, var(--navy) 0%, #0B1324 100%);
  }

  /* Subtle grid */
  #pacerai-homepage .hero-bg::before {
    content: '';
    position: absolute; inset: 0;
    background-image:
      linear-gradient(rgba(39,137,154,0.05) 1px, transparent 1px),
      linear-gradient(90deg, rgba(39,137,154,0.05) 1px, transparent 1px);
    background-size: 60px 60px;
    mask-image: radial-gradient(ellipse 80% 60% at 50% 40%, black, transparent);
  }

  /* Floating data lines */
  #pacerai-homepage .hero-lines {
    position: absolute; inset: 0; z-index: 0; pointer-events: none;
    overflow: hidden;
  }
  #pacerai-homepage .hero-lines svg {
    position: absolute; top: 10%; left: -5%; width: 110%; opacity: 0.15;
  }

  #pacerai-homepage .hero-eyebrow {
    position: relative; z-index: 1;
    display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px;
    padding: 6px 16px 6px 8px;
    background: rgba(39,137,154,0.10);
    border: 1px solid rgba(39,137,154,0.22);
    border-radius: 100px;
    font-size: 12px; font-weight: 500; letter-spacing: 0.08em;
    text-transform: uppercase; color: var(--teal);
    margin-bottom: 28px;
    animation: fadeUp 0.8s ease both;
  }
  #pacerai-homepage .hero-eyebrow .dot {
    width: 6px; height: 6px; border-radius: 50%;
    background: var(--teal);
    animation: pulse 2s infinite;
  }
  @keyframes pulse {
    #pacerai-homepage 0%, #pacerai-homepage 100% { opacity: 1; transform: scale(1); }
    #pacerai-homepage 50% { opacity: 0.5; transform: scale(0.8); }
  }

  #pacerai-homepage h1 {
    position: relative; z-index: 1;
    font-family: 'Cormorant Garamond', serif;
    font-size: clamp(48px, 7vw, 88px);
    font-weight: 300; line-height: 1.06;
    color: var(--white);
    letter-spacing: -0.01em;
    max-width: 900px;
    animation: fadeUp 0.8s 0.1s ease both;
  }
  #pacerai-homepage h1 em { font-style: italic; color: var(--teal); }

  #pacerai-homepage .hero-sub {
    position: relative; z-index: 1;
    font-size: 17px; font-weight: 300; color: var(--text-mid);
    max-width: 540px; line-height: 1.7;
    margin: 24px auto 40px;
    animation: fadeUp 0.8s 0.2s ease both;
  }

  #pacerai-homepage .hero-ctas {
    position: relative; z-index: 1;
    display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 14px;
    animation: fadeUp 0.8s 0.3s ease both;
  }
  #pacerai-homepage .btn-lg {
    padding: 14px 30px; font-size: 15px; font-weight: 600;
    color: #fff; background: var(--teal);
    border: none; border-radius: 8px; cursor: pointer;
    text-decoration: none; letter-spacing: 0.02em;
    transition: all 0.25s;
    box-shadow: 0 4px 24px rgba(39,137,154,0.30);
  }
  #pacerai-homepage .btn-lg:hover { background: var(--teal-light); transform: translateY(-2px); box-shadow: 0 10px 32px rgba(112,196,156,0.40); }
  #pacerai-homepage .btn-outline-lg {
    padding: 13px 28px; font-size: 15px; font-weight: 500;
    color: var(--white); background: transparent;
    border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.15); border-radius: 8px;
    cursor: pointer; text-decoration: none;
    transition: all 0.2s;
  }
  #pacerai-homepage .btn-outline-lg:hover { border-color: rgba(255,255,255,0.35); background: rgba(255,255,255,0.04); }

  /* Hero stats ticker */
  #pacerai-homepage .hero-stats {
    position: relative; z-index: 1;
    display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 48px;
    margin-top: 72px;
    padding-top: 40px;
    border-top: 1px solid var(--navy-border);
    animation: fadeUp 0.8s 0.4s ease both;
  }
  #pacerai-homepage .hero-stat .val {
    font-family: 'Cormorant Garamond', serif;
    font-size: 36px; font-weight: 500; color: var(--white);
    line-height: 1; letter-spacing: -0.02em;
  }
  #pacerai-homepage .hero-stat .val span { color: var(--teal); }
  #pacerai-homepage .hero-stat .label { font-size: 12px; color: var(--muted); margin-top: 5px; letter-spacing: 0.04em; }
  #pacerai-homepage .stat-divider { width: 1px; height: 48px; background: var(--navy-border); }

  /* ─── DASHBOARD PREVIEW ─── */
  #pacerai-homepage .preview-section {
    padding: 0 48px 100px;
    display: flex; justify-content: center;
  }
  #pacerai-homepage .dashboard-frame {
    width: 100%; max-width: 1080px;
    background: var(--navy-mid);
    border: 1px solid var(--navy-border);
    border-radius: 16px;
    overflow: hidden;
    box-shadow:
      0 0 0 1px rgba(39,137,154,0.12),
      0 40px 120px rgba(0,0,0,0.6),
      0 0 80px rgba(39,137,154,0.08);
  }
  #pacerai-homepage .frame-bar {
    background: var(--navy-light);
    padding: 12px 20px;
    display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 10px;
    border-bottom: 1px solid var(--navy-border);
  }
  #pacerai-homepage .frame-dot { width: 10px; height: 10px; border-radius: 50%; }
  #pacerai-homepage .frame-title {
    margin-left: 8px; font-size: 12px; color: var(--muted);
    font-weight: 500; letter-spacing: 0.04em;
  }
  #pacerai-homepage .frame-badge {
    margin-left: auto; font-size: 10px; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: 0.08em;
    text-transform: uppercase; padding: 3px 10px; border-radius: 100px;
    background: rgba(45,184,122,0.12); color: var(--green);
    border: 1px solid rgba(45,184,122,0.2);
  }
  #pacerai-homepage .frame-content { padding: 28px; }

  /* Mini ARR Waterfall mockup */
  #pacerai-homepage .arr-grid {
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: 140px repeat(5, 1fr);
    gap: 0;
    font-size: 12px;
  }
  #pacerai-homepage .arr-header {
    font-size: 10px; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: 0.1em;
    text-transform: uppercase; color: var(--muted);
    padding: 8px 12px; border-bottom: 1px solid var(--navy-border);
  }
  #pacerai-homepage .arr-header.highlight { color: var(--teal); }
  #pacerai-homepage .arr-cell {
    padding: 10px 12px;
    border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(30,45,74,0.5);
    font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums;
    font-size: 13px;
  }
  #pacerai-homepage .arr-label { font-weight: 500; color: var(--text-light); }
  #pacerai-homepage .arr-val { color: var(--text-mid); }
  #pacerai-homepage .arr-pos { color: var(--green); }
  #pacerai-homepage .arr-neg { color: var(--red-subtle); }
  #pacerai-homepage .arr-bold { font-weight: 600; color: var(--white); }
  #pacerai-homepage .arr-gold { color: var(--teal); font-weight: 600; }
  #pacerai-homepage .row-highlight { background: rgba(39,137,154,0.05); }

  /* Mini sparkline bars */
  #pacerai-homepage .mini-bars {
    display: flex; align-items: flex-end; gap: 3px; height: 36px;
    padding: 0 12px;
  }
  #pacerai-homepage .mini-bar {
    flex: 1; border-radius: 3px 3px 0 0;
    background: linear-gradient(180deg, var(--teal) 0%, rgba(39,137,154,0.35) 100%);
    transition: height 0.3s;
  }

  /* Metric cards row */
  #pacerai-homepage .metric-cards {
    display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(4, 1fr); gap: 16px;
    margin-bottom: 24px;
  }
  #pacerai-homepage .metric-card {
    background: var(--navy-light);
    border: 1px solid var(--navy-border);
    border-radius: 10px; padding: 16px;
  }
  #pacerai-homepage .metric-card .mc-label {
    font-size: 11px; color: var(--muted); font-weight: 500;
    letter-spacing: 0.06em; text-transform: uppercase;
  }
  #pacerai-homepage .metric-card .mc-val {
    font-family: 'Cormorant Garamond', serif;
    font-size: 28px; font-weight: 500; color: var(--white);
    line-height: 1.1; margin-top: 6px;
  }
  #pacerai-homepage .metric-card .mc-delta {
    font-size: 12px; font-weight: 500; margin-top: 4px;
    display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 4px;
  }
  #pacerai-homepage .up { color: var(--green); }
  #pacerai-homepage .down { color: var(--red-subtle); }

  /* ─── LOGO STRIP ─── */
  #pacerai-homepage .logo-strip {
    padding: 48px;
    border-top: 1px solid var(--navy-border);
    border-bottom: 1px solid var(--navy-border);
    text-align: center;
  }
  #pacerai-homepage .logo-strip .ls-label {
    font-size: 11px; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: 0.12em;
    text-transform: uppercase; color: var(--muted);
    margin-bottom: 32px;
  }
  #pacerai-homepage .logo-row {
    display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;
    gap: 48px; flex-wrap: wrap;
  }
  #pacerai-homepage .logo-item {
    font-family: 'Cormorant Garamond', serif;
    font-size: 18px; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: 0.06em;
    color: rgba(138,149,168,0.4);
    transition: color 0.2s;
  }
  #pacerai-homepage .logo-item:hover { color: rgba(112,196,156,0.6); }

  /* ─── SECTION HEADINGS ─── */
  #pacerai-homepage .section { padding: 100px 48px; }
  #pacerai-homepage .section-inner { max-width: 1080px; margin: 0 auto; }

  #pacerai-homepage .section-eyebrow {
    font-size: 11px; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: 0.14em;
    text-transform: uppercase; color: var(--teal);
    margin-bottom: 16px;
  }
  #pacerai-homepage h2 {
    font-family: 'Cormorant Garamond', serif;
    font-size: clamp(34px, 4.5vw, 56px);
    font-weight: 300; line-height: 1.1; color: var(--white);
    letter-spacing: -0.01em;
  }
  #pacerai-homepage h2 em { font-style: italic; color: var(--teal); }

  #pacerai-homepage .section-lead {
    font-size: 16px; font-weight: 300; color: var(--text-mid);
    max-width: 560px; line-height: 1.75; margin-top: 18px;
  }

  /* ─── USE CASE MENU STRIP ─── */
  #pacerai-homepage .uc-menu-strip {
    display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; gap: 6px;
    margin-top: 32px; margin-bottom: 48px;
  }
  #pacerai-homepage .uc-menu-item {
    padding: 10px 16px; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 500;
    line-height: 1.4; text-align: center;
    color: var(--muted); text-decoration: none;
    border: 1px solid var(--navy-border);
    border-radius: 8px; background: var(--navy-mid);
    transition: all 0.2s; white-space: nowrap;
  }
  #pacerai-homepage .uc-menu-item:hover {
    color: var(--white); border-color: rgba(39,137,154,0.35);
    background: rgba(39,137,154,0.06);
  }
  #pacerai-homepage .uc-menu-item.active {
    color: var(--teal); border-color: rgba(39,137,154,0.4);
    background: rgba(39,137,154,0.08); font-weight: 600;
  }

  /* ─── USE CASES ─── */
  #pacerai-homepage .use-cases-header { margin-bottom: 64px; }
  #pacerai-homepage .uc-grid {
    display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(2, 1fr); gap: 2px;
    border: 1px solid var(--navy-border); border-radius: 16px;
    overflow: hidden;
  }
  #pacerai-homepage .uc-card {
    background: var(--navy-mid); padding: 40px;
    position: relative; overflow: hidden;
    transition: background 0.25s;
    cursor: pointer;
  }
  #pacerai-homepage .uc-card:hover { background: var(--navy-light); }
  #pacerai-homepage .uc-card.primary { grid-column: 1 / -1; background: var(--navy-light); }
  #pacerai-homepage .uc-card .uc-num {
    font-family: 'Cormorant Garamond', serif;
    font-size: 64px; font-weight: 300;
    color: rgba(39,137,154,0.10);
    position: absolute; top: 20px; right: 28px;
    line-height: 1; letter-spacing: -0.04em;
  }
  #pacerai-homepage .uc-tag {
    display: inline-block; font-size: 10px; font-weight: 600;
    letter-spacing: 0.1em; text-transform: uppercase;
    padding: 4px 10px; border-radius: 4px;
    background: rgba(39,137,154,0.12); color: var(--teal);
    border: 1px solid rgba(39,137,154,0.22);
    margin-bottom: 16px;
  }
  #pacerai-homepage .uc-card.secondary .uc-tag {
    background: rgba(45,184,122,0.08); color: var(--green);
    border-color: rgba(45,184,122,0.2);
  }
  #pacerai-homepage .uc-card h3 {
    font-family: 'Cormorant Garamond', serif;
    font-size: 26px; font-weight: 500; color: var(--white);
    line-height: 1.2; margin-bottom: 12px;
  }
  #pacerai-homepage .uc-card.primary h3 { font-size: 32px; }
  #pacerai-homepage .uc-card p {
    font-size: 14px; color: var(--text-mid); line-height: 1.7;
    max-width: 480px;
  }
  #pacerai-homepage .uc-card .uc-link {
    display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 6px;
    margin-top: 24px; font-size: 13px; font-weight: 500;
    color: var(--teal); text-decoration: none;
    transition: gap 0.2s;
  }
  #pacerai-homepage .uc-card:hover .uc-link { gap: 10px; }
